neighborhoods.name: Ybor City / Channelside
neighborhoods.description: Historic cigar district with Latin heritage, 7th Avenue nightlife, and the waterfront Channelside development
neighborhoods.character: Historic cigar district, Latin heritage, nightlife

housing.predominantType: Converted cigar factory lofts, condos, and apartments

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Tampa. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: South Tampa / Hyde Park
neighborhoods.description: Affluent area with Hyde Park Village, Bayshore Boulevard, and the longest continuous sidewalk in the world
neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Tampa's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Temple Terrace / Riverview
neighborhoods.description: Eastern and southern communities with USF proximity, affordable housing, and growing development

housing.predominantType: Ranch houses, newer homes, and apartment complexes

neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Westchase / Carrollwood
neighborhoods.description: Northwestern communities with excellent schools, community pools, and family amenities
neighborhoods.character_notes: Family-friendly area with good schools, parks, and community amenities. Popular with active retirees and families.
